prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize glycogen loading and digestive comfort for early morning 15km run followed by afternoon 8km easy run
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Lactose intolerant, prefers easily digestible carbohydrates

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 6-8 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day with appropriate timing before and after training sessions
Pre-run meals are light, carbohydrate-dominant, and low in fat/fiber to minimize digestive discomfort
Total daily carbohydrate intake supports glycogen loading for high-mileage endurance training (approximately 8-10g per kg bodyweight)
All meals respect lactose intolerance restriction and are suitable for a lightweight endurance athlete
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1-day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a lightweight endurance athlete (distance runner) who has early morning training and needs a meal plan that optimizes glycogen loading while managing digestive comfort during high-mileage running
